title: 现代之城：起源
description: （实例、json、jar文件名应该取名为英文名）40多个模组，虽然少，这是你的世界，第一个方块应该由你来放，来吧创造这美丽的世界吧！
body:
# Modern Metropolis: Origins

## Project Overview

**Modern Metropolis: Origins** is a meticulously curated Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge modpack designed specifically for builders who dream in contemporary architecture. This pack provides a cohesive collection of modern construction materials, furniture, and technology mods on a clean slate world, offering unparalleled creative freedom to construct your ideal urban environment from the ground up.

**中文概述**：《现代之城：起源》是一个专为Minecraft 1.20.1（Forge）精心打造的现代化建筑整合包。它提供了一个纯净的画布和一套完整的现代建筑工具集，让建造者能够自由地设计和构建自己理想中的都市景观。

## Key Features

### 🎯 Cohesive Modern Experience
- Carefully selected mods that work together seamlessly
- Unified modern aesthetic across all building materials
- No stylistic conflicts or texture mismatches
- Perfect harmony between architecture, furniture, and decor

### 🏗️ True Creative Freedom
- Pristine world generation with no pre-built structures
- Complete freedom to plan and design your metropolis
- From single modern homes to entire city skylines
- Your vision, your rules - no forced objectives

### ⚡ Optimized Performance
- Enhanced stability and smoother gameplay
- Faster load times and reduced memory usage
- Optimized for medium to large building projects
- Focus on building, not troubleshooting

### 🛠️ Streamlined Building
- Intuitive mod integration and compatibility
- Smooth learning curve for all skill levels
- Comprehensive modern building solutions
- Everything you need, nothing you don't

## Technical Specifications

- **Minecraft Version**: 1.20.1
- **Mod Loader**: Forge
- **Project Page**: https://modrinth.com/modpack/xiandai
- **Recommended RAM**: 4-8GB allocation
- **Status**: Actively Maintained

## Perfect For Builders Who Want

- To practice and master modern architectural styles
- A pure, focused building environment without distractions
- To bring their urban development dreams to life
- A stable, well-integrated modern building experience

## Getting Started

1. Ensure you have Minecraft 1.20.1 with Forge installed
2. Allocate 4-8GB of RAM in your launcher settings
3. Download the pack from our Modrinth page
4. Launch and begin your architectural journey!

---

**中文版本**：

# 现代之城：起源

## 项目概述

《现代之城：起源》是一个专为Minecraft 1.20.1（Forge）版本精心打造的现代化建筑整合包。本整合包提供了一个纯净的世界画布和一套完整的现代建筑工具集，让建造者能够从零开始自由地设计和构建理想中的都市景观。

## 核心特色

### 🎯 统一的现代体验
- 精心挑选的模组，确保完美协同工作
- 所有建筑材料保持统一的现代美学风格
- 无风格冲突或材质不匹配问题
- 建筑、家具与装饰完美融合

### 🏗️ 真正的创作自由
- 纯净的世界生成，无预设建筑
- 完全自由的城市规划与设计
- 从单体现代住宅到完整城市天际线
- 您的愿景，您的规则 - 无强制目标

### ⚡ 优化的性能表现
- 增强的稳定性和更流畅的游戏体验
- 更快的加载时间和减少的内存占用
- 为中型到大型建筑项目优化
- 专注于建造，而非排除故障

### 🛠️ 流畅的建造体验
- 直观的模组集成和兼容性
- 适合所有技能水平的平滑学习曲线
- 全面的现代建筑解决方案
- 只包含您需要的内容

## 技术规格

- **Minecraft版本**: 1.20.1
- **模组加载器**: Forge
- **项目页面**: https://modrinth.com/modpack/xiandai
- **推荐内存**: 分配4-8GB
- **维护状态**: 积极维护中

## 适合的玩家群体

- 希望练习和掌握现代建筑风格的建造者
- 寻求纯净、专注建造环境的玩家
- 想要实现城市发展梦想的创作者
- 需要稳定、集成良好的现代建筑体验的用户

## 开始使用

1. 确保已安装Minecraft 1.20.1和Forge
2. 在启动器设置中分配4-8GB内存
3. 从我们的Modrinth页面下载整合包
4. 启动游戏，开始您的建筑之旅！

---

**Note**: The world is blank, but soon to be magnificent because of you. Your modern metropolis starts here.
**备注**: 世界是空白的，但即将因你而精彩。你的现代都市，就从这里开始。
